zh.lifeSummary: 當Clemencia de Malherbe於1178年出生在英國林可爾史爾阿波萊比時，她的父親John de Malherbe II44歲，母親Matilda FitzSwain43歲。她和Eudo de Longvillers至少有1個兒子。她去世於1246年在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clemencia de Malherbe于1178年出生在英国林可爾史爾阿波萊比时，她的父亲John de Malherbe II44岁，母亲Matilda FitzSwain43岁。她和Eudo de Longvillers至少有1个儿子。她去世于1246年在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Malherbe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, French, Huguenot: locative name from the canton of Malesherbes (Loiret) in France.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Clemencia de Malherbe was born in 1178, in Appleby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John de Malherbe II, was 44 and her mother, Matilda FitzSwain, was 43. She had at least 1 son with Eudo de Longvillers. She died in 1246, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clemencia de Malherbe est née en 1178, à Appleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Malherbe II, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Matilda FitzSwain, avait 43 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Eudo de Longvillers. Elle est décédée en 1246, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clemencia de Malherbe 1178 in Appleby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Malherbe II 44 und ihre Mutter Matilda FitzSwain 43. Sie hatte mit Eudo de Longvillers mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1246 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clemencia de Malherbe è nata il nel 1178 nel Appleby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John de Malherbe II, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Matilda FitzSwain, aveva 43 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Eudo de Longvillers. Morì nel 1246, nel Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Clemencia de Malherbeが1178年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアップレビーで生まれた時，父John de Malherbe IIは44歳，母Matilda FitzSwainは43歳であった。彼女はEudo de Longvillersとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1246年にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clemencia de Malherbe(이)가 1178년 영국 링코실르 애플레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Malherbe II(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda FitzSwain(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Eudo de Longvillers(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Farnley, Leeds, Yorkshire, England: Farnley, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clemencia de Malherbe nasceu em 1178, em Appleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Malherbe II, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Matilda FitzSwain, tinha 43 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Eudo de Longvillers. Ela faleceu em 1246, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clemencia de Malherbe родилась в 1178 г. в местности эпплеби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Malherbe II было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda FitzSwain, 43. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Eudo de Longvillers. Она умерла в 1246 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clemencia de Malherbe nació en 1178, en Appleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Malherbe II, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Matilda FitzSwain, tenía 43 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Eudo de Longvillers. Murió en 1246, en Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
